drl:
rule "R0"
when
    ( $p0_0 : T1() )
    or
    ( $p0_0 : T1() )
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T2($p0_0.getF0()));
end
rule "R1"
when
    T2(!(f0 == -0.5 || f0 >= 6.0), $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -4
agenda-group "gb"
when
    not T1(f0 <= 5, f1 >= "")
then
end
rule "R3"
salience 9
when
    $p3_0 : T2(f0 in (3, 3.5, 1.0), f0 > 100, $b3_0_0 : f0)
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    (or $p4_0 : T0(f0 in (-2.5, 5.5, -3.0), f0 != 0.5) $p4_0 : T0(f0 in (5.5, 1.5), f0 != 0.5) $p4_0 : T0(f0 not in (-1.0, 6.0), f0 != 0.5))
then
    delete($p4_0);
end
rule "R5"
salience -2
when
    T2(f0 in (3.5, 3.0), f0 != -1.0, $b5_0_0 : f0)
then
end
